nodes.label: AI as efficient research tool for specific tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as vague and unhelpful for broad queries
nodes.grounding_span: By asking for exactly what I am looking for it tends to speed up results hugely

nodes.label: AI use and creativity preservation
nodes.grounding_span: the more you rely on something else to come up with original ideas for you, the harder it becomes for you to do when you next try

nodes.label: AI as augmenting expertise vs replacing it
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: having the two lists just immediately provided, and therefore being able to compare them and determine my own order from the results was super helpful

nodes.label: Guilt vs satisfaction in AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I also feel somewhat guilty about switching over, as though I am taking the lazier option- however sometimes the results are so helpful that this guilt is assuaged

nodes.label: Social influence on AI adoption
nodes.label_negative: Independent AI adoption regardless of peers
nodes.grounding_span: I think I probably did end up using it more simply because of the frequency with which my superiors used it too

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my ability to think creatively

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding and personal achievement
nodes.grounding_span: I am keen to keep up my knowledge just for the security of knowing that I achieved something, and I can explain how I achieved any result I get

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for specific research tasks
nodes.grounding_span: having the two lists just immediately provided... was super helpful so I was very satisfied

nodes.label: Guilt about using AI as lazy option
nodes.grounding_span: I also feel somewhat guilty about switching over, as though I am taking the lazier option

nodes.label: Concern about AI diminishing creativity
nodes.grounding_span: the more you rely on something else to come up with original ideas for you, the harder it becomes for you to do when you next try

nodes.label: Openness to improving workflow with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am always open to improving and developing my workflow

nodes.label: Task decomposition and specific prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to go to the AI with very specific requirements

nodes.label: Self-imposed boundaries on AI use to preserve skills
nodes.grounding_span: I try and limit how much I use the AI
